configuration.api_url: Base URL for the OpenFoundry gateway.
configuration.token: Bearer token used for authenticated API operations.

resources.name: openfoundry_repository_integration
resources.description: Manage GitHub or GitLab sync configuration for an OpenFoundry repository.

attributes.repository_id: UUID of the repository managed by code-repository-review-service.

resources.name: openfoundry_audit_policy
resources.description: Manage retention and purge policies through audit-service.

attributes.name: Human-friendly policy name.
attributes.retention_days: Retention TTL for matching audit events.

resources.name: openfoundry_nexus_peer
resources.description: Register and authenticate a cross-organization peer in nexus-service.

attributes.auth_mode: mtls+jwt, oidc+mtls, or custom auth profile.
attributes.shared_scopes: Scopes allowed for federation and sharing.

resources.name: openfoundry_product_fleet
resources.description: Manage a rollout fleet for a packaged OpenFoundry product, including release channel, maintenance window, and auto-upgrade posture.

attributes.listing_id: UUID of the marketplace listing or product package.
attributes.name: Human-friendly fleet name.
attributes.environment: Target environment such as production, staging, or qa.
attributes.workspace_targets: List of enrollment/workspace targets managed by the fleet.
attributes.release_channel: stable, beta, canary, or a custom promotion channel.
attributes.auto_upgrade_enabled: Whether upgrades should roll automatically inside the maintenance window.
attributes.maintenance_window: Window definition with days, start hour UTC, duration, and timezone label.
attributes.branch_strategy: How enrollment-level branches should be created for feature work.
attributes.rollout_strategy: rolling, staged, or other custom rollout posture.

resources.name: openfoundry_enrollment_branch
resources.description: Create an enrollment-level feature branch for a product fleet rollout.

attributes.fleet_id: UUID of the product fleet owning the branch.
attributes.name: Branch name exposed to operators.
attributes.notes: Operational notes or rollout hypothesis for the branch.

resources.name: openfoundry_deployment_cell
resources.description: Model a SaaS or sovereign OpenFoundry deployment cell across one cloud/region pair, including workspace affinity and workload identity posture.

attributes.name: Stable deployment cell name such as eu-regulated or us-operations.
attributes.cloud: Target substrate: aws, gcp, azure, onprem, or hybrid.
attributes.region: Primary region or sovereign site for this cell.
attributes.environment: production, staging, qa, sovereign, or other control-plane environment.
attributes.workspace_targets: Enrollment/workspace targets pinned to this cell.
attributes.workload_identity: Structured cloud identity binding used by the control plane in this cell.
attributes.failover_priority: Lower number means this cell is promoted first during failover routing.

resources.name: openfoundry_geo_fence_policy
resources.description: Enforce data-residency and geo-ingress/egress restrictions for a deployment cell or platform edge.

attributes.name: Human-friendly geo fence policy name.
attributes.allowed_countries: ISO country codes permitted at the edge.
attributes.allowed_ingress_cidrs: Client CIDR allowlist applied at ingress or WAF layers.
attributes.allowed_egress_cidrs: Private backbone or partner CIDRs permitted for egress.
attributes.required_node_labels: Kubernetes node labels that constrain workload residency.
attributes.default_action: allow, deny, or observe-only posture when traffic is outside the fence.

resources.name: openfoundry_airgap_bundle
resources.description: Manage offline release bundles, private registry mirrors, and public-egress shutdown posture for air-gapped deployments.

attributes.name: Stable air-gap bundle identifier.
attributes.bundle_version: Offline release or export bundle version.
attributes.private_registry: Primary private registry or mirror endpoint used by Kubernetes and Compose profiles.
attributes.mirror_registries: Upstream registries mirrored into the private environment.
attributes.release_manifest_sha256: Checksum of the promoted offline release manifest.
attributes.public_egress_disabled: Whether public internet egress is blocked for workloads using this bundle.

resources.name: openfoundry_apollo_rollout
resources.description: Model autonomous CI/CD rollout posture for OpenFoundry fleets, tied to readiness gates and maintenance windows.

attributes.name: Human-friendly Apollo rollout name.
attributes.schedule: Cron schedule for reconciliation or promotion checks.
attributes.control_panel_readiness_path: API path used to fetch upgrade readiness before a rollout action.
attributes.fleet_ids: Managed product fleet ids reconciled by Apollo.
attributes.promote_webhook_path: Optional API path invoked after readiness becomes green.
attributes.release_channels: Release channels Apollo is allowed to act on.

data_sources.name: openfoundry_openapi_spec
data_sources.description: Expose the proto-derived OpenAPI contract for downstream tooling.
